recommendations.title: Veronika Decides to Die
recommendations.overview: After a frantic suicide attempt, Veronika awakens inside a mysterious mental asylum. Under the supervision of an unorthodox psychiatrist who specializes in controversial treatment, Veronika learns that she has only weeks to live.

recommendations.title: A.I. Rising

recommendations.title: Notorious

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.
